summary: No-ship: two Round 2 history-scale defects remain in bounded scan work and ai-title correctness for larger transcripts.

findings.title: maxScan still does not bound directory enumeration
findings.recommendation: Do not materialize the full root/project directory entry arrays before enforcing the scan budget. Use incremental directory iteration (for root and project dirs) or an index/cache so maxScan bounds the filesystem work, not only the later stat calls.

findings.title: Transcripts can still silently lose an ai-title beyond 512KB from EOF
findings.recommendation: Keep scanning backwards in bounded chunks until an ai-title is found or an explicit title-scan cap is exhausted; if exhausted, return an unknown/null title or surface truncation rather than falling back to the first user snippet while an unsampled ai-title may exist.
